source_excerpt: Products gross margin percentage increased during 2023 compared to 2022 due to cost savings and a different Products mix, partially offset by the weakness in foreign currencies relative to the U.S. dollar.
notes: The source supports the claim that Products gross margin improved in fiscal 2023, but there is no mention anywhere in the provided source text of unit shipments rising across every product category — that sub-assertion is entirely absent from the source and cannot be verified from it.
